The user asks to output a three-line status record. They have already provided the three fields and values. So we need to output exactly those three lines, each starting with the field name = value.

Thus the output:

repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

The instruction says: Return a plain text record with three key=value lines. No extra lines, no headings. Just the lines. Should follow exactly.

Thus we respond with these three lines.

Check if any additional formatting needed. Probably just plain text. Use exactly the values as given. Should we include "packet_id"? The request says "Return the three-line status record." The status record is route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. So we output those three lines. The user didn't ask to include packet_id. So we omit it. Good.

Thus answer:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
</think>
